title: AI Student Care Assistant
description: An intelligent AI-powered assistant built to support university students with academic advising, mental health resources, and campus navigation. Utilizes RAG pipelines and LLMs for contextual, empathetic responses.
impact: Reduced student wait times by 60% and handled 2,000+ queries in pilot deployment.

title: DiaBuddy AI — Diabetes Companion
description: Full-stack AI diabetes management app with glucose/food/activity tracking, RAG-powered chat grounded in ADA/NIH/CDC guidelines, dashboards with trend charts, time-in-range analysis, estimated A1C, and personalized insights.
impact: End-to-end health tracking with AI chat citing 28+ curated medical knowledge chunks.

title: Bio Scholar AI — Biomedical Research Assistant
description: RAG-powered biomedical research tool for querying scientific literature. Features paper summarizer via PubMed PMID/URL, structured summaries with key findings, methods, and clinical relevance.
impact: Instant structured summaries of biomedical papers with entity extraction and clinical insights.

title: NLP Research — RAG & LLMs
description: Advanced research on Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems, fine-tuning large language models for domain-specific knowledge extraction and question-answering tasks.
impact: Published findings improving retrieval accuracy by 28% over baseline approaches.

title: Parkinson's Disease Detection System
description: Machine learning pipeline for early detection of Parkinson's disease using biomedical signal data. Implements classification models with feature engineering for accurate diagnosis support.
impact: Achieved high classification accuracy for early-stage Parkinson's detection.

title: Multi-class Skin Disease Classification
description: Deep learning model for classifying multiple skin disease types from dermatological images. Enhanced with advanced preprocessing, data augmentation, and transfer learning techniques.
impact: Improved multi-class classification accuracy for dermatological diagnosis support.

title: Image Classification — CIFAR-10
description: Deep learning image classification system trained on the CIFAR-10 dataset. Implements CNN architectures with optimization techniques for high-accuracy object recognition across 10 categories.
impact: Robust image classifier across 10 object categories with optimized architecture.

title: Gold Price Prediction
description: Machine learning model for predicting gold prices using historical market data. Features exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and regression modeling for financial forecasting.
impact: Accurate gold price forecasting with comprehensive market trend analysis.

title: Netflix Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive analytics dashboard visualizing Netflix content trends, genre distributions, release patterns, and regional content analysis with dynamic filtering and drill-down capabilities.
impact: Comprehensive visual analysis of 8,000+ Netflix titles with interactive filters.

title: Student Engagement & Interest Dashboard
description: Interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing student engagement and interest levels across academic, social, navigation, and wellness categories. Provides dynamic filtering, KPI tracking, and subcategory insights to support data-driven decision-making.
impact: Analyzed 300+ student responses, identifying high-engagement categories and enabling actionable insights for student programs and planning.
